info.title: Troy Hokanson Document Standards Fetcher
info.description: Fetches the live locked-standard documents from the public GitHub repository to enforce formatting and voice rules on generated resumes and cover letters. Fetch HEADER_STANDARD.md and VOICE_STANDARD.md before writing any document.

get.summary: Fetch one of the four locked-standard documents from the GitHub repository.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the standard file to fetch. HEADER_STANDARD.md (visual layout) and VOICE_STANDARD.md (narrative voice) must both be fetched before writing any resume or cover letter. SYSTEM_PROMPT.md contains the universal AI system prompt. PLATFORM_SETUP.md explains per-platform AI configuration.

200.description: Successful response containing the raw markdown content of the requested standard document.
